name: Freddie King
abstract: Freddie King (born Fred King  September 3, 1934 – December 28, 1976), also billed as Freddy King, was an American blues guitarist, singer and songwriter. Along with the unrelated Albert King and B.

about_quotes.speaker: Tommy Ridgley
about_quotes.evidence: Freddie King went on and recorded it and made a national record... I don't know if Rick Records were ever paid any money from Freddie King.

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Witherspoon
about_quotes.evidence: I just heard a record the other day by Freddie King, the late Freddie King. I didn’t even know he cut “Ain’t Nobody’s Business.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Jimmy Witherspoon interviewed by Monk Rowe, Sarasota, FL, April 12, 1996

about_quotes.speaker: George Lewis
about_quotes.evidence: And Roy, and the Trammell's, the Cody Jones and Freddie King, Arthur Johnson.
